title: Master Mod
description: This Mod Adds Stuff That Only Masters Can Wield!!!
body:
This Mod Adds Its Own Dimension, Tools, Armor, Mob, Weapons And Ingotizer(Which Turns KBGems Into KB Ingot With A Click Of A Button

Stats:

KBSword: Attack Damage =102  AttackSpeed=1.6

KBAxe: Attack Damage=100 AttackSpeed=1,2 Efficiency=100

KBPickaxe: Attack Damage=7 AttackSpeed=1,2 Efficiency=100

KBShovel: Attack Damage=4 AttackSpeed=1,2 Efficiency=100

KBHoe: Attack Damage=4 AttackSpeed=1,2 Efficiency=100

Armor:

KBHemet: Protection=500 Knockback Resistance=20 Toughness=10

KBChestplate: Protection=1000 Knockback Resistance=20 Toughness=10

KBLeggings: Protection=750 Knockback Resistance=20 Toughness=10

KBBoots: Protection=500 Knockback Resistance=20 Toughness=10

KBCow:

Health=100

Drop=Cow Spawn Egg
